{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Lost Temple of Merduua
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Lost Temple of Merduua]] is in orbit outside [[Heliogoth IX]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
